data.content:
Tightened token-usage persistence to require a single resolved beat ID before writing a token_usage record, which prevents scene/orchestration sessions from misattributing one turn's usage across multiple beats. Updated the terminal take/breakdown/orchestration call paths to pass explicit beat-scoped attribution only when it is safe, and kept diagnostics coverage aligned with the persisted values by updating the focused token-usage test.

Validation: bun run lint (same pre-existing warning in src/components/beat-form.tsx:368), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build all passed.
